title: Ritsuko was raped
wikitext:
[]: Ritsuko was raped Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Sat Sep 26, 2009 5:28 pm Hey can someone point me out to shin-seiki's Ritsuko was raped thread/topic. I'm curious about that since there is nothing in the Geektionary. Im just curious about all that. Please excuse me if this somewhere in the forum and I missed it, but I was looking at all the threads and the list is EFFING HUGE.

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Sep 26, 2009 5:34 pm I believe you are looking for this: http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=3759 In the future, you might find this Google search format useful: "site:evageeks.org ritsuko rape" http://www.google.com/#hl=en&source=hp&q=site%3Aevageeks.org+ritsuko+rape&aq=f&aqi=&oq=&fp=7960896364bf1ed8
